Our Story

Where Ancient Ritual
Meets Modern Grace

TeaTapler was born from a singular obsession: to bring the world's finest teas to those who believe that a great cup is more than a beverage — it is a ceremony, a pause, a declaration of taste.

Sourced from elevation gardens in East Asia and beyond — each blend is curated by hand and paired with our legendary Sidr Honey.
